notes: Documented the Funds 13F app (Phases 1-3, work currently uncommitted on the hedge_fund_tracking branch): funds/fund_filings/fund_holdings/cusip_map tables; SEC EDGAR client (free, no API key, PersonalHub/1.0 User-Agent, <=10 req/s rate limiter, fast-xml-parser for 13F info-table XML); value-units rule (valueDollarMultiplier x1000 for filings before 2023-01-01); manual-refresh + backfill model (getRecent13Fs, BACKFILL_LIMIT=6, skips existing accessions, post-import link-backfill pass for NULL tickers); best-effort auto-linking via cusip_map + company_tickers.json normalizeName matching; /api/funds routes (GET /, /summary, POST /, GET /screener, GET /:id, /:id/holdings, /:id/deltas, POST /:id/refresh, POST /holdings/:holdingId/link, DELETE /:id); QoQ deltas (HoldingDelta new/add/trim/exit/hold); cross-fund screener (aggregate by CUSIP across funds' latest filings, screener router mounted before :id); client Dashboard/FundDetail (Holdings+Changes tabs, stock cross-links)/Screener pages + funds query keys; fast-xml-parser server dep. Prior Plaid brokerage docs remain current.
